metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for the RemotePass design team — QA, handoff, copy, critique, specs, research, and workflow

plugins.name: copy
plugins.description: UX copy and microcopy generation aligned to RemotePass voice and tone

plugins.name: critique

plugins.description: Engineering-ready component specs for developer handoff

plugins.description: Consistent developer handoff specs — same sections and style as EOR contract editing reference every time

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Research synthesis and competitive analysis for the RemotePass design team

plugins.name: workflow
